authority: This receipt records executed engine outcomes. The engine guards, not this prose, determine admission.

fold_fixed_point.result: The theorem-forced One is fixed by the foundation fold and is the only in-domain solution across the fold's two exhaustive affine branches.
fold_fixed_point.candidate_space: Both exact affine branches: x = 2x and x = 2x - One.

declared_descent_query.result: The explicitly supposed 3/4 query follows 3/4 -> 1/2 -> One.
declared_descent_query.claim_boundary: 3/4 is a declared query recorded by supposed_value, not a forced biological conformation. The executed orbit is the result.

colour_window_overlap.result: A colour-count window and binary-count overlap advance by the One.
colour_window_overlap.candidate_space: Every integer overlap from zero through the colour-count window.
colour_window_overlap.independent_route: colour_count - binary_count = fold period of the theorem-forced One

interwindow_quartet.result: Two colour-count windows with binary overlap form the binary square; consecutive quartets uniquely overlap by the colour count and advance by the One.
interwindow_quartet.candidate_space: Every integer overlap from zero through the derived quartet.
independent_routes: quartet - colour_count = fold period of the theorem-forced One

canonical_angle_forms.result: The canonical alpha-helix and beta-sheet phi/psi coordinates are the unique forms in their complete signed 24-lattice candidate spaces.
derivation: The main SFT corpus homochirality result supplies one global biological hand; the signed chart uses its negative-phi canonical representative and generates the opposite mirror exactly.
The two ordered period-two phi images take their unique lower preimages.
The depth-colour psi transient is generated completely; its first positive member supplies the primitive branch.
The closed Protein One-advance ranks the local helical turn and the closed colour window ranks the sheet-plane span.
The common homochiral phi orientation and binary same/opposite sign parity distinguish alpha and beta signs.

constants/homochirality.ep.role: engine-closed SFT homochirality result; the local V1 bridge canonicalizes its fixed global hand in the signed Ramachandran chart
